steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is “an artificial intelligence” — singular. The blank is the main verb of the independent clause. The rule of subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular verb form.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — powers: Singular present-tense verb; agrees with the singular subject “an artificial intelligence.” ✓
  • Choice B — are powering: Plural verb form — violates subject-verb agreement with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice C — power: Bare-infinitive form used as a plural verb — violates subject-verb agreement with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — have been powering: Plural present-perfect progressive form — violates subject-verb agreement with the singular subject. ✗
That matches Choice A — powers.
